resources.string: Enter an amount greater than zero.
Source category is required.
Income entry was not found.
Units must be a positive integer.
Rate must be greater than zero.
Declaration filed date is required for the selected status.
Payment sent date is required for the selected status.
Payment credited date is required for the selected status.
No unresolved FX entries were found.
Resolved FX for %1$d entries.
Resolved FX for %1$d entries, %2$d still need review.
%1$d entries still need manual FX review.
IE registration ID is required.
Taxpayer display name is required.
Tax rate must be a non-negative number.
Reminder time must use HH:mm format, for example 09:00.
Declaration reminder days must be comma-separated numbers between 1 and 15.
Payment reminder days must be comma-separated numbers between 1 and 15.
Income entries CSV exported.
Monthly summaries CSV exported.
JSON backup exported.
Backup imported. Restored %1$d income entries, %2$d month records, %3$d statements, and %4$d imported transactions.
Data operation failed.
This PDF has already been imported. The source fingerprint matches an existing statement.
%1$d statement lines could not be parsed and were skipped.
Imported %1$d income rows. Stored %2$d parsed transactions. Skipped %3$d duplicates and left %4$d rows excluded.
Imported %1$d income rows from %2$s.
Official NBG FX rates were applied automatically for %1$d entries.
Official NBG FX rates were applied for %1$d entries. %2$d still need review.
%1$d imported entries still need manual FX review.
No preview was produced for the selected PDF.
Failed to parse the selected PDF.
Unsupported PDF. This importer only supports the current TBC statement layout without OCR.
Pick and parse a PDF before importing.
Included taxable rows must have a positive amount, currency, and source category.
Import failed.
Unsupported PDF. Only text-based registry extracts and Georgian small business status certificates are supported in onboarding.
This PDF looks like a Georgian small business status certificate, not a registry extract.
This PDF looks like a registry extract, not a small business status certificate.
Failed to parse the selected PDF.
Display name is required.
Registration or personal ID is required.
Default tax rate must be a non-negative number.
Registration date must use YYYY-MM-DD format.
Certificate issued date must use YYYY-MM-DD format.
Failed to save onboarding data.
Registry extract import does not autofill small business status effective date.
Small business status effective date is parsed from the certificate line stating when the status was granted.
Review every parsed field before applying it to onboarding.
Software services
Consulting
Marketplace payout
Other
Bank fee
Own account transfer
Imported statement income
Imported statement review
